economic_notes: LMG acquired 100% of Terres Notre-Dame Inc. on December 17, 2021. Additional investment in E. Gagnon & Fils generating return of $0.10/lb on crab resource price plus prime rate +2%. Holds shares in Hexo Corp (formerly Zenabis). Joint arrangement with Mi'gmawei Mawiomi Business Corporation Inc.
notes: Prior year figures restated due to ISC and Health Canada review reports affecting deferred revenue, unexpended funds, and recoverable amounts. Two consolidated subsidiaries: Listuguj Mi'gmaq Government Land Acquisition Corporation and Listuguj Mi'gmaq Government Development Center. Land Settlement Trust Fund included as restricted asset/liability. isc_funding calculated as ISC ($7,059,413) + ISC-LMDC ($592,763) = $7,652,176. total_government_transfers includes Federal Operating ($33,388,787) + Federal Capital ($19,720,446) + Provincial Operating ($2,266,573) + Provincial Capital ($256,988) + CMHC Due From ($2,624,205) - these overlap with Due From Governments; using statement of operations government transfer lines: $33,388,787 + $19,720,446 + $2,266,573 + $256,988 = $55,632,794. osr = $98,427,107 - $55,632,794 = $42,794,313. Schedule of salaries for elected officials referenced on page 30 but not fully visible in provided pages.
